<!--
Thanks for opening a PR. Please:

  1. Sign your commits: `git commit -s` adds the Developer Certificate
     of Origin line. PRs without sign-off auto-fail CI.
  2. Scope it: one concern per PR. Big refactors are better as RFCs.
  3. Tick the boxes below.
-->

## What this changes

<!-- One paragraph. What problem does it solve, what does it now do? -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Performance improvement (include a measurement)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tooling / CI
- [ ] Other (explain)

## Tested how

<!-- Specifics. "Ran the sample game" is fine; "ran on a Tezeract device
     with hand tracking on" is better. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits signed off (`git commit -s` — DCO required)
- [ ] Touched files match the existing code style
- [ ] No new dependencies, or new deps justified in the PR description
- [ ] AIDL contracts in `sdk-motion/` unchanged, OR a deprecation
      story is in this PR (breaking AIDL strands every published game)
- [ ] If you touched `docs/`, the affected pages still build under
      mkdocs strict mode

## Related

<!-- Issue numbers, prior PRs, design discussions, etc. -->
